Recipe file template for LLMs

- Filename: use a slugified title (lowercase, hyphens), end with .md
- Title: Use H2 (##) with the recipe name
- Source: include a single line with the original URL in markdown link form
- Times: include Prep Time, Cook Time, Total Time, Servings, Yield as separate lines
- Ingredients: a '#### Ingredients' heading and a bullet list of ingredients (one per line)
- Directions: a '#### Directions' heading and numbered step-by-step instructions copied verbatim from the source when possible
- Notes: optional '#### Notes' section for tips or variations
- Footer: include exactly this italic line at the bottom: *This website was created with copilot*

Rules for contributors/LLMs:
1. Do NOT modify any existing recipe files. Create a new file for each recipe.
2. Use exact, word-for-word step instructions from the source when available. Preserve punctuation and order.
3. Keep formatting consistent with other recipe files in the repository.
4. Include the source URL and do not remove attribution.
5. Name files using the slugified title (e.g., "toll-house-chocolate-chip-cookies.md").
6. If any optional ingredient (like nuts) is present on the source, include it but mark as optional in parentheses.
7. Do NOT include nutrition information; omit nutrition sections from recipe files.
